v0.2 FROZEN at commit b36f1c3, tag v0.2-phase0-design pushed to OpenCoven/coven-threads. Design doc 358 lines, 12 sections, cleared by Nova + Echo. Phase 1 kickoff still gated on threads-986.5 (Cody scoping) + Val's §9.3/§9.4 open-question decisions.

Scoping read complete; resolutions landed in commit 86550d8. §4 open questions: (1) Strand enum-over-struct — enum, for extension via exhaustive-match (strand.rs); (2) Channel four-variant set exhaustive for Phase 0/1, Federation deferred (channel.rs); (3) Weave.pattern Box<dyn PatternPredicate> confirmed as frozen, describe() derived-introspection implemented with anti-pattern prose (pattern.rs module docs); (4) weave_hash canonical ordering (surface_path, writer_id) lexicographic confirmed and property-tested (weave.rs). MutationAuthority stays removed — writer/gate/load axes split across WriterId/PatternPredicate/Channel.

Workspace + crate landed in commit 86550d8, pushed to origin/main. cargo check/test pass; structure matches design doc §4: ids, channel, strand, thread, weave, pattern, fray, plus manifest (hash-manifest layer) and validate (§5 receiver). 70 tests green, clippy clean.

Supporting types landed in 86550d8: SurfaceId/WriterId/EventRef string newtypes + StrandId/ThreadId/WeaveId/FamiliarId/CovenId/ManifestId uuid newtypes (ids.rs); WeaveCoherence Coherent/Degraded/Broken (pattern.rs); PatternDescriptor + StrandRequirement + StrandKind (pattern.rs, strand.rs). Serde derives on all; round-trip serialization tests pass (ids_roundtrip_json, describe_is_derived_and_deterministic, verdict_serializes_for_audit, strands_roundtrip).

Core types landed in 86550d8: Channel enum (channel.rs), Strand enum with frozen five kinds (strand.rs), TensionState Holds/Frayed{channel}/Snapped{channel} (thread.rs), Thread with holds_under(channel) method + holds_under: Vec<Channel> field per §4, FrayOrSnap error type incl. fail-closed NotCovered (fray.rs), Weave with pattern field (weave.rs). Docstrings cite PHASE-0-DESIGN § anchors; construction unit tests per type; hold/fray/snap exercised under all four channels.

PatternPredicate trait landed in 86550d8 (pattern.rs): coherent() authoritative, describe() -> PatternDescriptor derived; descriptor-vs-predicate anti-pattern documented in module prose AND trait docs per Echo third turn. Concrete impl AllSurfacesHoldOnChannels (incl. rfc0001_floor()) passes 7 unit tests. Validator gates on predicate only — never descriptor (validate.rs).

Merkle weave_hash landed in 86550d8: canonical (surface_path, writer_id) lexicographic ordering enforced at Weave construction; merkle_root with leaf/node/empty domain separation + length prefixes (manifest.rs); thread leaf commits surface/writer/channels/tension/strand commitment bytes (weave.rs). Tests: ordering deterministic across input permutations, any strand change changes weave_hash, tension change changes hash, empty weave defined 32-byte hash, plus 25-round xorshift property test (shuffle-stable, edit-sensitive). Ordering documented in weave.rs + manifest.rs module docs.

Rust conformance mirror landed in 86550d8 at crates/coven-threads-core/tests/rfc0001_s5_conformance.rs: all 5 positive + 9 negative upstream cases (familiar-contract/tests/conformance) mirrored into gate-layer facts, each test doc-citing its upstream case dir and violated property. Positive cases assert Coherent + bound-writer Permit; negative cases assert the specific non-green shape (Degraded-at-surface, Broken, WriterNotBound, UnknownSurface, DegradeToProposal on content drift). 14/14 pass in 0.00s (AC <5s).

Thread.holds_under Vec<Channel> and the five frozen strand kinds; (3) hash-manifest layer: merkle_root (domain-separated, length-prefixed) + HashManifest, weave_hash covers strand content; (4) crate skeleton at crates/coven-threads-core; (5) cargo test covers hold/fray/snap semantics under all four channels (Deliberate, Forced, Serialization, Mutation) — thread.rs::holds_fray_snap_exercised_under_all_four_channels + per-channel floor tests; (6) evidence: cargo test 70 passed 0 failed (56 unit + 14 RFC-0001 §5 conformance mirror), cargo clippy 0 warnings.
